channel.title: Churn on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Churn on RaihnForge

item.title: Loyalty Program Project
item.description: A note on naming. The original paper named the specific EdTech employer, its flagship product, the cities and platforms involved, and the CRM and support tools in use. For public posting, all of these have been generalized: “the organization,” “the survey platform,” “the sales CRM,” “the support platform,” “a major cloud productivity suite,” and similar. The analytical content is preserved. The intent was always portfolio reflection on customer relationship design, not commentary on any specific commercial entity.
